message:
✨ feat: add expertise radar chart to leaderboard hover card (#1504)

- Extract shared radar logic (dimensions, scoring, radarPoint) into
  src/lib/radar.ts to avoid duplication between leaderboard and profile
- Add compact MiniRadarChart component showing 6 expertise dimensions
  in the hover card (renders only when topics data is available)
- Make entire hover card clickable to open profile details page
  (uses router.push instead of nested Link to avoid invalid HTML)
- Add keyboard accessibility (Enter key) on hover card
- Profile page ([username]/page.tsx) now imports from shared module

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
